title: VAD
description: Voice Activity Detection configuration. Controls how jambonz detects the presence or absence of speech on the audio channel. Used to determine speech start/end boundaries for recognition and barge-in.

enable.description: Whether to enable voice activity detection.

voiceMs.description: Duration of voice activity (in milliseconds) required before speech is considered to have started.

silenceMs.description: Duration of silence (in milliseconds) required before speech is considered to have ended.

mode.description: WebRTC VAD aggressiveness mode (0-3). Higher values are more aggressive at filtering non-speech. Only applies when vendor is 'webrtc'.

threshold.description: Speech detection confidence threshold for Silero VAD. Value between 0 and 1, where higher values require greater confidence. Only applies when vendor is 'silero'.

speechPadMs.description: Padding in milliseconds added before and after detected speech segments. Prevents clipping utterance boundaries. Only applies when vendor is 'silero'.
